ksa_text: Knowledge of data product design principles, including data product definition, consumer segmentation, interface design (APIs, subscriptions, files), Service Level Agreement (SLA) definition, and data product lifecycle management.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Quality KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.426) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Governance. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.426 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Data Quality. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Data Quality is not sufficiently central to the Director of Data Governance to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Governance roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Quality is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Data Governance. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Data Governance competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.426) and edge-domain placement (Data Quality) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Data Governance. All passes support exclusion.
